doc: A self-playing vibrato drone. An LFO sweeps the oscillator's freq around 440 Hz, so it sounds the moment you run it — no input needed. Nudge it live over OSC: /lfo/rate (sweep speed, Hz), /lfo/depth (vibrato width), /lfo/center (the pitch it swings around).

nodes.doc: Sine modulation of the oscillator freq.
Drone tone, freq driven by the LFO.
